  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "In a scenario where two people have to decide whether to contribute to a public good, the contribution from each person is independent of the other's contribution. Using Bayesian game theory, determine the probability that both individuals will contribute to the public good, assuming that the probability of a person contributing is 0.7. What is the expected contribution from each person?",
